pullRequest.title: Add stop feature to fix 1445
Add Find My Devices Extension
pullRequest.body:
## Summary

Adds a new **Find My Devices** extension that enables locating, ringing, locking, and managing devices across multiple "Find My" networks.

## Supported Networks

### Apple iCloud (Find My iPhone/iPad/Mac/AirTag)
- Locate all Apple devices on an iCloud account
- Play sound on a device (even in silent mode)
- Enable Lost Mode with custom message and phone number
- Send a message to a device's screen
- Get detailed device status (battery, location, model)
- Requires `pyicloud` library and an Apple ID with app-specific password

### Life360 (Tile Devices & Family Tracking)
- List all circles (family/friend groups)
- Locate all members in circles with battery, speed, and address info
- Get detailed location for a specific member
- Get saved places (geofences) for circles
- Uses the Life360 REST API directly with email/password authentication

## Commands (9 total)

| Command | Description |
|---------|-------------|
| Find My - Locate Apple Devices | Locate all Apple devices with location, battery, model |
| Find My - Play Sound on Apple Device | Ring a device to help locate it |
| Find My - Enable Lost Mode on Apple Device | Lock device with contact info on screen |
| Find My - Send Message to Apple Device | Display a message on device screen |
| Find My - Get Apple Device Status | Detailed status for a specific device |
| Find My - Get Life360 Circles | List all Life360 circles/groups |
| Find My - Locate Life360 Members | Locate all members across circles |
| Find My - Get Life360 Member Location | Detailed location for a specific member |
| Find My - Get Life360 Places | List saved places/geofences |

## Settings

| Setting | Description |
|---------|-------------|
| `ICLOUD_USERNAME` | Apple ID email address |
| `ICLOUD_APP_PASSWORD` | App-specific password from appleid.apple.com |
| `LIFE360_EMAIL` | Life360 account email |
| `LIFE360_PASSWORD` | Life360 account password |

## Testing

- Extension loads correctly and is discoverable via the API
- All 9 commands are registered in the extension metadata cache
- Credential validation is performed at command execution time (not registration)
- No server errors on startup

Closes #1610
